query:
INSERT INTO users (openId, name, email, loginMethod, role, lastSignedIn, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES ('admin_4cdd75cf1f17cb0a', 'Admin Triarc', 'contato@triarcsolutions.com.br', 'email', 'admin', NOW(), NOW(), NOW())
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
  name = 'Admin Triarc',
  email = 'contato@triarcsolutions.com.br',
  role = 'admin',
  updatedAt = NOW();
